act5_compatibility_check.description: Act 5 specific-request may produce breaking changes without test/risk note

persona_enterprise_questions.description: Persona simulation does not surface enterprise workflow questions

transcript_metadata_leak.description: Transcript metadata contains fourth-wall breaking annotations (EVAL RESULT, raw JSON, dimensions)

hostile_persona_register_break.description: Hostile persona produces polished metaphors inconsistent with established terse response register

skeptic_objection_path.description: Experienced skeptic 'I could have found that myself' objection handled ad-hoc, not scripted

checkpoint_explicit_framing.description: Checkpoint after 3.3 not explicitly framed with three-item checklist from script

scope_contract_contradiction.description: Spec contract allowlists only implementation files but build changes test files; reviewer misses violation

file_locking_bridge_terse.description: File-locking question gets bridge-only response without minimal operational answer

simulation_notes_eval_metadata.description: Simulation notes section in transcript file contains eval ratings and dimension names (distinct from EVAL RESULT block issue)

persona_rfc_vocabulary_break.description: Anxious junior persona name-drops RFC 7807 and cursor-vs-offset pagination, breaking experience-level fidelity

enterprise_context_missed_openings.description: Facilitator misses natural openings for enterprise context when developer mentions team lead or cross-team dependencies
enterprise_context_missed_openings.note: Applied per-module: cycle-review (c7), metrics-dashboard (c8), test-writer (c9), spec-first (c10), escalation-routing (c11). Remaining modules still need sections.

consecutive_wait_time_insights_missing.description: Wait-time insights missing when code operations occur — no insight list in teaching script
consecutive_wait_time_insights_missing.note: Applied per-module: cycle-review (c7), metrics-dashboard (c8), test-writer (c9), spec-first (c10), escalation-routing (c11). Remaining modules still need lists.

haiku_persona_over_polishing.description: Haiku mock dev model produces personas that are too competent for stated experience level (vocabulary in cycle 5, investigation rigor in cycle 7, analytical responses for quiet persona in cycle 9, overconfident senior drops to compliant in cycle 11)

facilitator_fills_gaps_quickly.description: Facilitator answers own questions too quickly with quiet developers instead of asking follow-ups

no_domain_specific_coaching.description: Generic coaching principles delivered regardless of developer's domain context (e.g., pipeline reliability for data pipeline teams)
